info.name: Laravel API Documentation
info.description: Kin Parental Control Platform REST API. Three guard-separated client surfaces: Parent app (Bearer Sanctum), Admin backoffice (Bearer admin-sanctum), and Child device (X-Device-UUID header).

item.name: User: Authentication
item.description:
Endpoints for parent / user account lifecycle (register, login, logout, profile).
Routes under `auth:admin-sanctum` share this controller for CRUD; those are tagged separately via `@group` on each method.

item.name: User: Device Management
item.description:
Parent device lifecycle (register, list, show, delete, status, commands).
Telemetry feed endpoints are tagged `@group User: Telemetry Feeds` or `@group Admin: Telemetry Feeds`.

item.name: Mobile device registers or updates its own metadata.

formdata.description: Must be at least 10 characters. Must not be greater than 4096 characters.

item.name: Parent lists their registered child devices.
Parent gets details of a specific child device.
Parent deletes / dissociates a specific child device.
Parent lists their own support conversations (paginated).
Parent retrieves the full thread of one of their conversations.
Parent opens a new support ticket conversation.
Admin: Authentication
item.description: Admin backoffice login/logout and admin account CRUD.

item.name: Admin: Titles
item.description: Manage support ticket category titles (admin-only CRUD).

item.name: Admin: Notifications
item.description:
Broadcast push notifications to all parents or specific users.
Device and user read-only endpoints are tagged in each method.

item.name: Admin: Conversations
item.description:
Support ticket conversation management. Admin methods are in this group;
user-facing methods are tagged `@group User: Conversations` individually.

item.name: Send a message into a conversation thread.

request.description:
The service resolves the correct MessageSender enum (user / admin / support)
by inspecting which guard is currently authenticated.

item.name: Broadcast a "is typing…" presence signal to the conversation channel.
Mark all messages up to a given ID as read for the current actor.
Admin lists all support conversations (paginated, filterable, sortable).
Admin retrieves the full thread of a given conversation.
Send a message into a conversation thread.

request.description:
The service resolves the correct MessageSender enum (user / admin / support)
by inspecting which guard is currently authenticated.

item.name: Broadcast a "is typing…" presence signal to the conversation channel.
Mark all messages up to a given ID as read for the current actor.
Device: Sync & Telemetry
item.description:
Dedicated ingestion and synchronization controller for mobile child devices.
Restrictions and command endpoints are tagged `@group Device: Restrictions & Commands`.

All methods are encapsulated in $this->invokeWithCatching(function () { ... })
to respect the strict "zero logic in the controller" architectural contract.

item.name: Ingest a validated SQLite telemetry batch from a child mobile device.
Pull active restriction rules for the child device.
Pull pending remote commands for the child device.
Respond to a specific scheduled remote command (submit execution result).

formdata.description: This field is required when file is not present. Must not be greater than 2048 characters.
